description: Fix wheel zoom step to fixed 0.1, unify +/- button step, align layer icon heights, add Sharp Corner button with mutual-exclusion, and add standalone Ungroup button.

userStories.title: Fix wheel zoom step to fixed 0.1 per tick and unify +/- button step
userStories.description: As a user, I want the mouse wheel and +/- buttons to zoom smoothly at a predictable 10% rate, so that I can zoom without the view jumping uncontrollably.
acceptanceCriteria: CanvasComponent.tsx wheel handler: use direction = Math.sign(e.deltaY) and step = direction * 0.1, ignoring deltaY magnitude
newZoom = direction > 0 ? currentScale - 0.1 : currentScale + 0.1, clamped to [MIN_ZOOM, MAX_ZOOM]
ZOOM_FACTOR constant (0.08) is removed or unused by wheel handler
Wheel handler still calls zoomFromCenter(newZoom, ...) for viewport-center anchoring
Define ZOOM_STEP = 0.1 as a named constant
BottomPanel +/- buttons updated from 0.25 to 0.1 step in onClick handlers
One wheel tick changes zoom by exactly 10% (e.g. 100% to 110% or 100% to 90%)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Align layer management icon heights
userStories.description: As a user, I want all 4 layer management icons to have consistent visual height, so the toolbar looks polished.
acceptanceCriteria: BringForwardIcon arrow shaft extended so SVG bounding box height matches BringToFrontIcon (span y=5 to y=19)
SendBackwardIcon arrow shaft extended so SVG bounding box height matches SendToBackIcon (span y=5 to y=19)
Arrow head/tip positions remain visually proportional
All 4 icons share viewBox 0 0 24 24 (unchanged)
Hover and disabled states still work correctly (no CSS logic changes)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add Sharp Corner button with mutual-exclusion state
userStories.description: As a user, I want a Sharp Corner button next to Round Corner, so I can easily revert rounded shapes back to sharp corners.
acceptanceCriteria: Sharp Corner button added immediately to the left of the Round Corner button in Row 1 of UnifiedToolbar
Sharp Corner icon is an SVG showing a sharp-cornered rectangle (not rounded)
Sharp Corner button has same enabled/disabled condition as Round Corner (only enabled for rectangle/rectangle-solid/rhombus/rhombus-solid tools)
Mutual exclusion: clicking Sharp Corner sets isRoundCornerEnabled to false; clicking Round Corner sets it to true
At most one of Sharp/Round can be visually active (highlighted border/background) at a time
Clicking Sharp Corner with eligible selected elements EXPLICITLY sets their borderRadius to 0 (even if currently undefined), pushes history snapshot, and calls onSceneMutate('update')
Clicking Sharp Corner with no eligible selected elements only changes the global preset (new shapes get borderRadius = 0)
Pass isSharpCornerEnabled prop (derived from !isRoundCornerEnabled when active tool is eligible) to UnifiedToolbar
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add standalone Ungroup button with correct state machine
userStories.description: As a user, I want dedicated Group and Ungroup buttons to manage element groups, so I can group and ungroup elements with clear, explicit controls.
acceptanceCriteria: Single Group/Ungroup toggle button replaced with two separate buttons: Group and Ungroup in Row 1 of UnifiedToolbar
Group icon replaced with SVG of four squares converging toward center
New Ungroup icon SVG of four squares spreading outward from center
Group button enabled when selectedElements.length >= 2 AND NOT areElementsInSameGroup(selectedElements)

CRITICAL FIX: Ungroup button enabled when ALL selected elements share a common top-level groupId AND no other non-selected elements have that same top-level groupId. (Do NOT require length >= 2, to allow ungrouping orphaned 1-element groups).

Clicking Ungroup identifies the shared top-level groupId, removes ONLY that specific groupId from each selected element's groupIds array via filter (preserving nested groups if any), pushes history, calls onSceneMutate('update'), and re-renders
Z-Index preserved: element order in Scene.elements array is NOT changed during ungroup
Both buttons have correct hover and disabled visual states (opacity 0.4 for disabled)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
